purpose: Track dragons that are visible in the Dragon Pit but are not currently discovered, owned, or hatched. This file is intentionally separate from dragons.json, which remains the owned-dragon master roster.

dragons.name: Kalspire
dragons.evidence: The Dragon Pit profile explicitly displays Not Hatched.

dragons.name: Venator
dragons.evidence: The Dragon Pit profile explicitly displays Not Hatched.

dragons.name: Sheepstealer
dragons.evidence: The Dragon Pit profile explicitly displays Not Discovered.

ownership_transitions.name: Caraxes
ownership_transitions.evidence: The updated Dragon Pit profile shows Caraxes as a level 35, 1-star Hunter Hatchling with 0/40 relic progress.

rules: Do not place entries from this file in dragons.json until ownership or hatching is confirmed.
Do not use not-discovered or not-owned dragons in current army compositions.
Add a dragon only when the screenshots explicitly confirm that it is not discovered, not owned, or not hatched.
When ownership is confirmed, remove the dragon from the dragons array, add it to dragons.json, and record the transition.
